item.dc:creator: MyNameGifOreilly

item.title: 37 and ten months of HRT
item.description: Left, two weeks into HRT thinking I’m too old. Right, ten months HRT after going to a wedding as myself. A year ago, for pride, I made a post on here; admitting to myself and the world that I needed to transition. I was so full of fear. I’ve got a long way to go but for the first time I feel the progress. Thank you to all those that helped me get here, the Imgur community is full of wonderful individuals who talked to me throughout the doubt and depression that the process brings. It wasn’t easy and I wouldn’t be here without any of you. I acknowledge all your hard work even if we don’t talk anymore. Thank you. If this gets downvoted because it’s a selfie, fine. I do hope those individuals who helped me see this. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: EmmAhGerd

item.title: It’s time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
kinda cool
gonna smoke that
that's pretty metal
that's a lot of movies
the early ones of course
I just use a fan
(it was me)
legend
every time
what is this, a McDonald’s for bees?
Arnie lookin kinda rough
no thanks
i don't know what Lidl is but i want that
i can think of like infinity that don't, but somehow still kinda true
you could mess with him with just a simple comma - "penis, man"
i won't lie, i've watched that show myself a time or 2
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The RV Flip research vessel is unique in the world, capable of switching from horizontal to vertical position in the open ocean
item.description: The RV Flip research vessel is unique in the world, capable of switching from horizontal to vertical position in the open ocean. Measuring around 108 meters long and weighing 700 tonnes, Flip is not a small ship. Engineers designed it so that it could tilt 90 degrees, placing the front of the ship 17 meters above the water (the height of a five-story building), while the stern dives up to 91 meters deep. This deep immersion of most of the ship improves its stability and resistance to waves. The transformation takes about 30 minutes, during which seawater is pumped into huge tanks at the stern, allowing the ship to right itself. This ship is considered one of the most important for scientific research in the marine environment. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/RP_FLIP
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: A bookshop owner inSouthampton, England has asked for help as he moves his library due to high rent and wants to move the books to the new location. The person is surprised by the presence of more than 250 young people, elderly, to help move
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: the harpy's meme dump: volume 41
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. Today is a difficult day for me. I briefly whined about it, then remembered that the internet doesn't care about my problems, so I deleted it and have brought you funny content instead. However, if you are a person like me who has a dad who sucks, and today is not a great day... my advice to you is to fight him while you still have the chance to. Or at least yell at him for being terrible. ...Anyway, onwards!
Definitely not, there's so many wonderful ladies who are considerably funnier than I. We should all start a coven or something though, that would be rad
why do they respawn so quickly? dishes OP, nerf them
ah, yes...how perfect. ...for "gaming", of course.
o r b
a valid question
yaaaay birds!
dinner? movie? no thanks, let's go look at DINOSAURS
you deserve it, friend
with enthusiastic gratitude!
and then there I'll be, on the final boss fight, with 1000 healing potions, and I still won't use them. You know. JUST IN CASE.
as always, fuck JK Rowling
aaaand that's all for this meme dump, my imgur friends. Until next time, stay awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: How hoarding gets started.
item.description: Comic by Fishtrouts https://www.tumblr.com/fishtrouts
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Happy Father's Day
item.description:
A picture of Tiny Octopus (from the back) and the tiniest on her first day of school many years ago. This remains one of my favorite pictures of us.
The tinier. She was about a month old here, and I couldn't find her bear, so I gave her a hammer. It worked. I love these two with all my heart, and if something ever happened to them, I would burn the world down to mete justice on the perpetrators. As a kid who was given up on twice, once by birth parents, once by adoptive parents, there's no job more worthwhile and more impactful. Your presence or your absence matters. It echoes far past your day to day concerns. To all the rest of you dads out there stepping up. I know it's not always easy, and some days it's the easiest thing on your plate. I see you. I appreciate you.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: I am her hooman
item.description: This one, out of the 3, climbs up my leg or cries until I pick her up and then falls right to sleep - which makes it difficult to game. She is probably going to be called Dora the Ah Dora ble.
item.dc:creator: BrandonMoon

As per Sunday tradition, a theme dump. Let's get that bread.
"How beautiful art thy buttocks" in Middle Kingdom hieroglyphics. @SecretHarpy
Pippin tax! And Bronze-age tax; this shortsword is made of bronze.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: My kid will have a boring dad and like it!
item.description: Growing up I had an alcoholic father who couldn’t really hold a job for long. Brilliant man. He had photographic therapy and could play any instrument within a few hours. A fucking amazing musician. Other than that he had no skills. No handyman skills or anything with sports. He hated any “modern” music…70s, 80s, or 90s music. Only jazz. If you have been on here long enough you may have seen a post I made of my father dying and us never getting any closure over the lack of a better word, hell I went through when my parents divorced and the alcoholism consumed him. Therapy has helped a lot and my kid the community has named “baby spice” has been amazing. Now I realize I have absolutely no skills to teach my spawn. No handyman skills no automotive skills, nothing with sports. I can teach him the chemistry of hot sauce (I got a new recipe coming everyone!) but nothing that will be useful as an adult. So no I’m learning to be a fucking adult and be a father. So for Father’s Day I wanted to make this post to scream into the void. Thank you for letting me vent. Two days left with students and I’m done for this school year!
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman
